name: @soltrade/keyless-custody-lifecycle
description: Keyless Custody Lifecycle Model (Gate E / E2-0): in-memory/mock custody state machine (load/use/zeroize) with fail-closed DEGRADED, least-privilege per signer_profile_id, and revoke/disable/shutdown/panic. NO KEYS, NO KMS/vault, NO KeyManager, NO crypto/signing library, NO tx build/serialize, NO signing/sending, NO RPC, NO DB, NO REAL-LIVE, NO mechanism-guard carve-out, NO execution authority. Key material is refused, never stored or returned.
